channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses (1512 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yjeanrenaud

📝 Repository: yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses

📄 Descrizione: attempting to detect smart glasses nearby and warn you

⭐ Stelle: 1512

🍴 Forks: 66

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-app meta privacy privacy-protection ray-ban-meta-smart-glasses self-defense smartglasses smartphone

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T13:56:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-12T00:33:10Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
